channel.title: STLA — Smart money 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move on STLA (Stellantis) by the 30 tracked portfolio managers — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing wave. Not investment advice.

item.title: Mohnish Pabrai: TRIMMED STLA (-25%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Mohnish Pabrai (Pabrai Investment Funds) trimmed STLA in Q3 2025 · 21.3% of portfolio. Material Stellantis reduction.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Mohnish Pabrai)
